case_title: LEE KONG WONG et al VS. CHENHUI LUI et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-31-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HERTZ CLAIMS MANAGEMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, LEE KONG WONG, WAI CHUN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERTZ CLAIMS MANAGEMENT $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,095.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $1000.00 FOR EACH PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT CHENHUI LUI IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, CHENHUI
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CHENHUI LUI BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-20-2009 AT 1:30PM.
RETURN OF CONTINUANCE ORDER - SENT TO CHENHUI LUI
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, RETURNED, SENT TO CHENHUI LUI
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-15-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-20-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WONG, LEE KONG WONG, WAI CHUN YEUNG-WU, YUET WAH AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, CHENHUI HERTZ CLAIMS MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, WAI CHUN AS TO DEFENDANT HERTZ CLAIMS MANAGEMENT
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, LEE KONG AS TO DEFENDANT LUI, CHENHUI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-20-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-20-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHENHUI LUI NOT PRESENT - NOT SERVED. CO-DEFT HERTZ CLAIMS MANAGEMENT PRESENT. EXHIBITS RETAINED. AMY WONG INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CHINESE - CHINESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED.(506).
